lesson.title: Hana tushilikilo tumwe kuli valongi uvahule jijila vazachishilamo tushilikilo
topics: Mutwe wachihande ou uneulula valongi halumbunwiso namilimo yatushilikilo.
resources: EXPECTED STANDARD: Kulumbununa muthu vanachisoneka mujila yakwoloka.
